summary: Diagram tool project with save/load functionality and icon drag behavior fixes in progress.
known_issues: Save diagram does not persist correctly or reappear on loadout
Dragging a toolbar icon also drags the label text beneath it

existing_features.title: Fix the save diagram functionality so that when a user saves a diagram, it is correctly persisted to the backend and reappears when the diagram list (loadout/sidebar) is opened or refreshed. The saved diagram should appear in DiagramSidebar and LoadDiagramDialog after saving without requiring a page reload.

In the AttackPathToolbar, restrict drag-and-drop behavior on icon buttons so that only the icon image element is draggable, not the text label beneath it. The draggable attribute and drag event handlers (onDragStart) should be scoped to the icon image element only, not the entire button or label text. The selected element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[7]/button[3] is one such toolbar icon button.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix save diagram so it persists and appears on loadout
Restrict drag behavior to icon image only, not the label

projectName: Fix save/load diagram persistence and restrict icon drag to image only
